calendar.description: House Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing
Senate Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses provisions related to the Department of Natural Resources and related regulated areas.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>removes language related to determining the work period for certain Department of Natural Resources' employees;<hr><ltbullet>defines terms, including defining "invasive mussel";<hr><ltbullet>exempts an owner or operator of certain vessels from requirements related to invasive species and launching or operating the vessel on waters of the state;<hr><ltbullet>addresses vessels owned by government agencies;<hr><ltbullet>amends provisions related to a required aquatic invasive species education course;<hr><ltbullet>addresses vessels rented or leased from a boat livery, including modifying recordkeeping requirements for a boat livery;<hr><ltbullet>modifies provisions related to collection of annual aquatic invasive species fees, including repealing outdated language;<hr><ltbullet>addresses responsibilities of the Division of Law Enforcement and the Division of Wildlife Resources;<hr><ltbullet>modifies provisions related to records kept by the Division of Water Rights, including to allow for the records to be kept in physical or electronic form;<hr><ltbullet>corrects citations;<hr><ltbullet>addresses funding of litigation;<hr><ltbullet>addresses treatment of water rights after termination or noncompliance of certain royalty contracts or mineral leases;<hr><ltbullet>removes a cap on low-interest loans related to secondary water metering;<hr><ltbullet>modifies when certain applications may be filed with the state engineer under instream flow provisions;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies rulemaking authority related to rules enforced by the Division of Law Enforcement;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the duties of the Utah Geological Survey;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the makeup of the Board of the Utah Geological Survey;<hr><ltbullet>changes the term "buffalo" to "bison" in certain circumstances;<hr><ltbullet>repeals the section specifying funding sources of the Watershed Restoration Initiative;<hr><ltbullet>repeals the Alternative Energy Development Tax Credit Act; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming amendments.
